product_updates.title: Roelof Botha joins SpaceX’s board of directors
product_updates.content: The former Sequoia Capital leader is filling an "existing vacancy" on SpaceX's board, days after the company went public in the largest IPO ever.

product_updates.title: After unveiling ridiculously expensive AR glasses, Snap’s stock takes a dive
product_updates.content: Snap's long-awaited smart glasses debut hasn't exactly done wonders for the company's stock.

product_updates.title: NEA’s Tiffany Luck says enterprises are still figuring out their AI ROI
product_updates.content: Tokenmaxxing was the hottest trend in Silicon Valley earlier this year, with CEOs encouraging employees to push AI usage as far as it would go. Then the bill came due. Uber reportedly blew through its annual AI budget in a few months, some companies cut Claude licenses for parts of their org, and…

product_updates.title: World leaders want American AI. They just don’t want America to be able to turn it off.
product_updates.content: French President Macron and Indian PM Modi raised alarms at the G7 summit that the U.S. could cut off access to American AI overnight — a fear the Anthropic blackout just made real.

product_updates.title: Anthropic becomes first AI startup to join the Frontier carbon removal coalition
product_updates.content: Anthropic has joined the Frontier coalition, which received another $915M in pledges to fund carbon removal projects.

product_updates.title: Social media’s next evolution: user-controlled algorithms
product_updates.content: Social media feeds are becoming more customizable as platforms like Threads, Instagram, and TikTok introduce tools that let users directly influence the algorithms powering their recommendations.

product_updates.title: NEA’s Tiffany Luck on AI IPOs, personal agents, and the ROI reckoning
product_updates.content: Tokenmaxxing was the hottest trend in Silicon Valley earlier this year, with CEOs encouraging employees to push AI usage as far as it would go. Then the bill came due. Uber reportedly blew through its annual AI budget in a few months, some companies cut Claude licenses for parts of their org, and…

product_updates.title: World model maker Odyssey nabs $1.45B valuation backed by Amazon and other big names
product_updates.content: World models are the next big thing in AI beyond LLMs and, with this round, Odyssey has cemented itself as one of the startups to watch.

product_updates.title: Only 16 percent of Americans think AI will have a positive impact on society, a new study shows
product_updates.content: Although Wall Street loves AI, every day Americans are significantly less optimistic about the industry, a new report from Pew Research shows.

product_updates.title: Google bets on Gemini to reinvent the smart home speaker
product_updates.content: Google is betting generative AI can breathe new life into the smart speaker. The company's new $99.99 Google Home Speaker replaces the rigid commands of the Google Assistant era with more conversational Gemini interactions.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Massive breach spills credentials for thousands of sensitive networks
technical_breakthroughs.content: The affected include Oracle, Lenovo, FedEx, a NATO contractor, and Fortinet.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Tesco moving 40,000 server workloads off VMware amid Broadcom's “abusive conduct”
technical_breakthroughs.content: Tesco claimed Broadcom hiked its VMware prices by about 175 percent in UK court filings.

technical_breakthroughs.title: "Dangerous" AI models are coming no matter what
technical_breakthroughs.content: AI models with advanced hacking capabilities will soon be the norm.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: a reality check for geoengineering and the science of interoception
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: Windows and Linux users: The deadline to update Secure Boot keys is near
technical_breakthroughs.content: What you need to know about the expiration of keys securing your machine's boot sequence.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Entrepreneurs in Nairobi make the case for going solar
technical_breakthroughs.content: Most of Kenya’s power grid runs on renewables. But with 25% of communities lacking centralized electricity, the nation is looking to off-grid solar to hit its goal of delivering universal electricity access by 2030 without driving up emissions.
